FRENCH

A Short Story

Imagine attending an international conference where people from different African countries are discussing business opportunities. Everyone around you is speaking French. While others struggle to communicate, you confidently join the conversation, build connections, and discover opportunities. Sometimes a language can open doors that talent alone cannot open.


What Is French?

French is one of the most widely spoken international languages in the world. It is spoken across Europe, Africa, North America, and many international organizations. Learning French allows students to communicate with millions of people and access global opportunities.


What Will You Study In SHS?

As an SHS student, you may study topics such as:

  • French Vocabulary
  • Grammar
  • Reading and Comprehension
  • Writing Skills
  • Listening Skills
  • Conversation Practice
  • French Culture
  • Translation Skills
  • Communication Techniques
  • Language Expression

Career Opportunities

French can support careers such as:

  • Diplomat
  • Translator
  • Interpreter
  • International Business Professional
  • Teacher
  • Tourism Officer
  • Foreign Service Officer
  • Journalist
  • International Relations Specialist
  • NGO Professional

Something Most Students Don't Know

Many students think French is just another school subject. In reality, French is a competitive advantage. Ghana is surrounded by several French-speaking countries, and many international organizations prefer people who can communicate in multiple languages. A second language can significantly increase your career opportunities.


Want To Learn More?

This is only a small introduction. If you want to understand how programmes connect to university courses, careers, opportunities, and future success, get a copy of:

📘 YOU ARE IN CONTROL: PICK YOUR OWN COURSE

The guide designed to help students make informed decisions about their future and discover opportunities they may never have considered.
